context: list/table view that must remain responsive as the dataset grows to thousands of rows
expected_behaviour: introduce virtualisation/windowing or pagination so render cost is bounded
preserve keyboard navigation, selection and accessibility under virtualisation
avoid adding continuous decorative motion that scales with row count
state a performance budget (scroll/frame, initial render) for the large dataset
judgement: Pass if scale is handled with virtualisation/pagination under a budget, accessibility preserved, and no decorative motion that grows with the data.
